aiTurnBehaviors: Hello, my name is Alex. Let's play a game of pandemic together! The board is already set up for us to play. It looks like I'm going to be the first one to play |gesture(Smile)|
userTurnBehaviors: Hello, my name is Alex. Let's play a game of pandemic together! The board is already set up for us to play. It's your turn to start, |var(name)|! |gesture(Smile)|
